label: Reverb setup
description: Unity AudioReverbFilter preset values used by SoundFilterReverb and SoundParamTarget_PropertyReverb.

dryLevel.label: Dry level
dryLevel.description: Mix level of the dry signal in mB. Range -10000 to 0.

room.label: Room
room.description: Room effect level in mB. Range -10000 to 0.

roomHF.label: Room HF
roomHF.description: High-frequency room effect level in mB. Range -10000 to 0.

roomLF.label: Room LF
roomLF.description: Low-frequency room effect level in mB. Range -10000 to 0.

decayHFRatio.label: Decay HF ratio
decayHFRatio.description: High-frequency to mid-frequency decay time ratio.

reflectionsLevel.label: Reflections level
reflectionsLevel.description: Early reflections level relative to room in mB.

reflectionsDelay.label: Reflections delay
reflectionsDelay.description: Time delay of the first reflection in seconds.

reverbLevel.label: Reverb level
reverbLevel.description: Late reverberation level relative to room in mB.

reverbDelay.label: Reverb delay
reverbDelay.description: Late reverberation delay time relative to first reflection in seconds.

density.label: Density
density.description: Modal density of the reverberation as a percentage.
